paths.name: react
paths.message: Use kea for state management instead of React's useState. Otherwise, state will be lost when switching PostHog tabs.

paths.name: dayjs
paths.message: Do not directly import dayjs. Only import the dayjs exported from 'lib/dayjs'.

paths.name: chart.js
paths.message: Do not directly import chart.js. Only import the Chart and friends exported from 'lib/Chart'.

paths.name: chart.js/auto
paths.message: Do not directly import chart.js/auto. Only import the Chart and friends exported from 'lib/Chart'.

paths.name: ~/queries/schema
paths.message: Import from 'queries/schema/schema-foo' to avoid Webpack/Sucrase enum export issues.
